reviews.comment:
Los playeros que atienden los surtidores del lado de alte Brown y santa fe no tienen ninguna gana de trabajar. La atención al socio es pésima.

(Translated by Google)
The attendants at the pumps on the Alte Brown and Santa Fe side have absolutely no desire to work. Customer service is terrible.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtdjZmVUJBEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención y servicio. Los socios del ACA tienen cochera gratis por 5 dias mensuales desde Abril (post semana santa) y hasta Noviembre.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and attention. ACA members receive free parking for 5 days per month from April (after Easter) until November.

reviews.comment:
No la pisen. Sin exagerar demoré 20 minutos para cargar combustible. Fila de autos y los playeros sin ganas de trabajar. No se recomienda.

(Translated by Google)
Don't go there. I'm not exaggerating. It took me 20 minutes to get gas. A line of cars and the attendants were clearly not working. Not recommended.

reviews.comment:
Siempre los visito y siento un afecto especial por José que hace años lo conozco. Todos los chicos son buenísimos, atienden cualquier consulta. La mejor predisposición. Los recomiendo

(Translated by Google)
I visit them often and have a special affection for José, whom I've known for years. All the staff are wonderful and always ready to help. They're incredibly helpful. I highly recommend them.
